expectations.text: Output is valid JSON matching the skill's schema (all 5 components present)
expectations.evidence: JSON has scenario.scene, scenario.evidence, scenario.characters, scenario.debateTriggers, scenario.teacherKey, scenario.portalIntegration — all present and correctly structured.

expectations.text: Contains exactly 4-6 pieces of forensic evidence
expectations.evidence: 6 evidence items (E1-E6): accelerant residue, electrical arc bead, cigarette butt DNA, shoe impression, fireproof document box, security camera footage.

expectations.text: At least 2 pieces of evidence point to different suspects (Contradiction Rule)
expectations.evidence: E1 (accelerant) suggests arson pointing to any suspect. E2 (arc bead as 'cause bead') suggests accidental electrical fire — contradicting arson entirely. E3 (cigarette DNA) points to Karen. E4 (boot print) points to Daniel. E6 (camera figure) could be Karen or Ryan.

expectations.text: All characters have both a selfless act and a selfish act (Moral Gray Rule)
expectations.evidence: All 4 characters (Daniel, Karen, Ryan, Mitch) have explicit selflessAct and selfishAct fields with specific, detailed past instances.

expectations.text: Arson/fire investigation terminology is scientifically accurate and 9th-grade appropriate
expectations.evidence: Uses GC-MS, ILR, V-pattern, accelerant, arc bead, SEM, cause bead vs. victim bead, NFPA 921 reference, Class 3 ignitable liquid, pour pattern. Terms explained in context.

expectations.text: Teacher key explains all contradictory evidence with valid forensic science
expectations.evidence: All 6 evidence items explained. Arc bead controversy acknowledged (real debate in fire forensics). GC-MS overlap between lighter fluid and polyurethane explained. Cigarette timing resolved. Boot print explained (Daniel's panic entry). Camera figure identified (Karen, not Ryan).

expectations.text: Scene has enhanced spatial detail suitable for 3D modeling (dimensions, object placement, entry points)
expectations.evidence: 7.3m x 6.1m x 3.7m peaked roof. 9 spatial markers with precise metric measurements. Compass directions. Entry/exit points (roll-up door south, personnel door east, windows west/north). Interior zones defined (west=workshop, east=storage). Excellent 3D detail.

expectations.text: portalIntegration section is present with evidenceLockerItems, discoveryMilestones, and narrativeHooks
expectations.evidence: portalIntegration has 9 evidenceLockerItems, 7 discoveryMilestones with XP values, and 3 narrativeHooks with quest connections.
